ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If toggled on the calendar will show the week starting with Sunday. If toggled off, it will show Monday as the starting day.
ast.target: 如果开启，日历将以周日作为一周的开始。如果关闭，则以周一作为开始日。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If toggled on the calendar will show the number of days difference from today on each day in the calendar, and for the current date if the time is between midnight and 4AM, it will add a moon emoji.
ast.target: 如果开启，日历将在每个日期上显示与今天的天数差，并且对于当前日期，如果时间在午夜到凌晨4点之间，将添加一个月亮表情符号。
